name: csi-nora-tools
description: CSI Nora sandbox MCP server — exposes calculator, web_search and wikipedia_lookup as MCP tools (shared logic with the LangChain agent in src/providers/tools.py).

csi-nora-tools.description: Local stdio transport. Run from the ai-ecosystem-sandbox root (or set cwd there). No container needed — ideal for Cursor / Claude Desktop.

csi-nora-tools-sse.description: HTTP/SSE transport via the nginx reverse proxy (start the full stack: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.proxy.yml up -d). Replace 9090 with your PROXY_HTTP_PORT / LAN host.
